message:
test(utils): add comprehensive unit tests for utils module

Add 30 unit tests across utils/ module:
- format.rs (16 tests): truncate_string (UTF-8, emoji, edge cases),
  format_size (bytes, KB, MB, GB), format_duration (seconds, minutes, hours)
- fs.rs (9 tests): ensure_dir (create, nested, idempotent),
  read_optional (exists, missing, unicode, multiline)
- git.rs (5 tests): current_branch stub, is_repo detection

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
